title: PRODUCE MATCH - 211info
text: FARMERS MARKET FUND PRODUCE MATCH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF If a person receives cash benefits on their Oregon Trail card rather than SNAP (food) benefits, they are eligible to participate in the Produce Match program. This program allows people to double SNAP cash dollars to spend on fresh produce at participating farmers markets. Website Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: EBT Cash recipients Hours: Varies Email (503) 208-4495 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 208-4495 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Use the DUFB website to find locations currently participating in the EBT Cash Produce Match program. -Farmers markets: Walk in and visit the information tent to match up to $20 per day with Produce Match for fresh fruits and vegetables. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: SNAP EBT Card (Oregon Trail Card) AREA SERVED: Multnomah, Washington, Clackamas, Clatsop and Columbia counties. Services: Farmers Markets * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Fresh Food * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE FOOD - DOUBLE UP FOOD BUCKS FOOD - FARMERS MARKETS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FARMERS MARKET FUND
